message:
fix(tests): properly shut down TCP connections and join server threads

Harden test networking to prevent socket leaks and thread orphans:

- harness.rs MockHttpServer::drop(): Replace fire-and-forget
  TcpStream::connect with connect + explicit shutdown(Both) to
  cleanly unblock the accept loop.  Add shutdown(Both) after
  read_to_string in the connection test.
- e2e_ollama_live.rs: Shut down probe socket after connectivity check.
- security_http_policy.rs: Replace 4 instances of `let _server =`
  (fire-and-forget server threads) with `let server =` + explicit
  `server.join().unwrap()` to ensure clean teardown and surface
  panics from server threads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
